quotes.text: I'm 72 and I read a lot of reviews. My swing speed with a driver floats around 79-83 mph and I basically play bogey golf. Over the last couple years I won my flight of our Club Championship, came in 2nd the next year, and shot the lowest round of my life this year, a 75! I saved the balls from those 3 achievements — in order they were a TM TP5x, Callaway Chrome Soft X, and another TM TP5x. I know an 80mph swing speed doesn't figure well with X golf balls, but based upon my results they've worked well for me, go figure?
